creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text: The distfile must have been rerolled since I first submitted it. I don't see any changes in the new tarball. Please see the attached patch rerolled with new distinfo and after aarch64 fix. This also removes the stray LUA_TYPE line which crept up as I was playing with a different approach to specifying whether to use luajit2 or the portable lua.
